backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor defining Tutorial and Exercise types with hardcoded content, providing query methods to fetch tutorials/exercises by difficulty, and shared methods to track user progress (completed tutorials and solved exercises) per Principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping five main features (homepage, tutorials section, practice exercises, user progress tracking, and visual design) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the educational theme styling, routing structure, page components, hooks for backend queries, and progress tracking UI.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining design tokens for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title, root div, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for home, tutorials list/detail, and practice list/detail pages, all wrapped in Layout component with type-safe router configuration.
frontend/src/components/CodeEditor.tsx: Simple code editor component wrapping a Textarea with monospace font styling and Python 3.x label for code input.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing logo and navigation buttons (Home, Tutorials, Practice), main content outlet, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/ProgressDashboar: Dashboard displaying three progress cards (overall, tutorials, exercises) with percentage completion, progress bars, and statistics fetched from user progress and content hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useExercises.ts: React Query hook that fetches exercises from the backend actor, optionally filtered by difficulty level.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout with AuthClient integration, including identity management and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines mutations for completing tutorials and solving exercises, with automatic cache invalidation of user progress data.
frontend/src/hooks/useTutorials.ts: React Query hook that fetches tutorials from the backend actor, optionally filtered by difficulty level.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProgress.ts: React Query hook that fetches user progress (completed tutorials and solved exercises) for the authenticated user's principal.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm, educational color palette for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ExerciseDetailPage.ts: Displays individual exercise details with an integrated code editor, allowing users to write, run, and submit Python solutions with validation feedback.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, progress dashboard, and navigation cards linking to tutorials and practice exercises.
frontend/src/pages/PracticePage.tsx: Lists practice exercises with difficulty filtering, showing completion status and linking to individual exercise detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/TutorialDetailPage.ts: Displays individual tutorial details with content, code examples, difficulty badge, completion status, and a button to mark tutorials as complete.
frontend/src/pages/TutorialsPage.tsx: Lists all Python tutorials in a card grid with filtering by difficulty level (beginner/intermediate/all), showing completion status and progress tracking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme including OKLCH color system, typography plugin, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), and animation utilities.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (homepage, tutorials, practice exercises, user progress, design theme) and pending features (code execution system).
